threat_robot: My job will be replaced by a robot
threat_ai: My job will be taken over by an artificial intelligence (AI) tool like ChatGPT
threat_platform: My job will be replaced by a person providing a similar service on an internet platform
threat_skills: I will lose my job because I am not good enough with new technology or because I will be replaced by someone with better technological skills
threat_foreign: My job will be taken over by a person coming from another country
threat_offshored: My job will be moved to a different country
opp_worklife: Technology will help my job and working hours become more compatible with my private life (↗)
opp_physical: Technology will help my job become less dangerous or physically demanding
opp_mental: Technology will help my job become less boring, repetitive, stressful or mentally demanding
